title: SB 504 immediately becomes law as several other Becker bills advance in Senate
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: SB 504 ensures equal access to voter registration for overseas military personnel and people living with disabilities.
SB 504 notifies formerly justice-involved Californians when they are eligible to re-register to vote.
SB 504 clarifies that registered voters no longer need to apply to vote by mail.
The Digital Education Equity Program (DEEP) will provide California public school districts with equitable access to professional development for teachers.
The Digital Education Equity Program aims to enable schools to effectively use technology in education.
SB 1223 allows a diagnosis of mental disorder to be included in eligibility criteria for mental health diversion.
